title: Eroteum yungasium

Here's a paragraph about Erythroxylum yungasium:

Erythroxylum yungasium is a plant species in the Erythroxylum genus, commonly known as a shrub or a small tree. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, and is believed to aid in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Erythroxylum yungasium include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Erythroxylum yungasium is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some regions, it is used to make a medicinal drink called "maté de coca", which is also known as coca tea.
